title: HA design: active-passive govd + advisory-lock lease (M3)
deliverable: active-passive over shared Postgres; single-writer via Postgres advisory-lock lease (no split-brain); WS resume per spec/inflight; maintenance mode pre-issues short-TTL grants; standby serves signed feed mirrors

acceptance.failover_drill: kill active mid-stream; standby acquires lease, WS resume, zero dup grants, zero lost step_results
acceptance.no_orphaned_run: interrupted runs reach terminal/resumable within lease TTL+30s
acceptance.split_brain: second writer cannot append while lease held; attempt recorded
